transcript.content: 已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```
已经收成全绿了。 我继续做的两条通用修正是： - `continue` 下如果有 turn 被降成 `pin-only`，拒绝激活 - `summary-first` 不再强制优先；只要 raw keep 更轻，就统一退回 raw keep

decision.archive_summary: Resolved coding thread about Codex minor GC regression coverage and guard behavior. The user asked to extend harder Chinese multi-topic/切题 cases into fixed regressions and avoid whitelist-like hardcoding. Final state reported: harder case added to fixed live evals; packaged guard tightened so it cannot override a shadow-guard veto; `continue` activations are rejected if any required turn was demoted to pin-only; `summary-first` is no longer forced when keeping raw turns is lighter; eval run reported all green.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active thread appears resolved: the last user request was simply to continue, and the assistant reported the work as completed and green. There is no newer unresolved ask in the transcript. Because the next turn can travel lighter, earlier raw turns can leave the prompt. Pin the durable intent and final technical outcome so the resolved topic can be recalled compactly without retaining the full raw exchange.
